author: mirnovov
description: Open a note, base, or workspace on startup, or set it for quick access later.

manifest.author: novov
manifest.description: Open a specified note, canvas, base, or workspace on startup, or set it for quick access later.
manifest.name: Homepage

name: Homepage

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Further enhancements to code quality and structure
- Fix a formatting issue introduced to the settings pane in 4.4.1
- Change the ribbon icon to use Obsidian's default icon library, for consistency with the new Obsidian plugin directory

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Improve various aspects of the codebase to comply with the new Obsidian plugin scoring system. Note that the majority of this work relates to internal aspects of the plugin and should not affect user-facing functionality. 
- Add [artifact attestation](https://docs.github.com/en/actions/concepts/security/artifact-attestations) to the plugin files that Obsidian downloads. This helps verify that they are the same as the publicly available code on this repository.
- Fix a possible crash when opening from an empty tab (#143)

#### Removals and deprecations
As part of this, Homepage now requires Obsidian 1.12.2 or later.

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
* Add two commands for Obsidian's new command-line interface:
   * `homepage` opens the homepage in Obsidian.
   * `homepage:read` prints the contents of the homepage file to `stdout`. If the homepage configuration doesn't map to a file (for instance, when a workspace is set as the homepage), or if the file is invalid, a message will be displayed instead.
* Fix occasional issues with history not saving (part of #135)

Note that although commands require Obsidian 1.12.0 or later, this version continues to work on Obsidian 1.11.x as well.

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description: * Add a Russian translation courtesy of @CYANID3 (#133, #139)

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
* Redesign the plugin's settings page for the changes in Obsidian 1.11
* Use the internal logic for opening files on startup introduced in 1.11 for the built-in "Default file to open" setting. This should make opening notes on startup more reliable. (Although this setting replaces a few features of Homepage, the plugin will still continue to be maintained as most features are not covered.)
* Add a new option to create a new file for the homepage, designed to correspond to the "Default file to open" setting. Since Homepage allows opening a homepage multiple times instead of just on startup, a new file will be created when the homepage is first opened, and that file will then be used for the rest of the Obsidian session. A prefix can also be specified for the file, instead of just "Untitled". 
* Add internal logic to handle translations of the plugin text
* Minor wording changes for consistency

#### Removals and deprecations
* Homepage now requires Obsidian 1.11 or newer. Older versions of Obsidian should automatically fetch the preceding versions of this plugin.

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description: - Fix changes in Obsidian 1.9.1 that caused opening a base when it is already open to result in duplicate tabs.

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description: * Add support for Obsidian's new Bases feature. Like Canvas and Markdown, a Base can be chosen as a file and displayed as the homepage. Note that this currently requires a pre-release version of Obsidian.

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description: * Add support for the [Journals](https://github.com/srg-kostyrko/obsidian-journal) plugin, as an alternative to Periodic Notes (#92)

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
* Allow setting a random note inside a folder as the homepage (#115)
* When using Obsidian Sync, wait until syncing is finished before resolving and opening the homepage (#116)

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
- Add donation option (not expecting anything, but in the off chance people want it)
- Fix issues with the [File Color](https://github.com/ecustic/obsidian-file-color) plugin caused by the changes in 4.0.6 (#104, #106). Note that the File Color plugin is unmaintained and has several issues unrelated to Homepage that were encountered during testing. If possible, the usage of an alternate solution is recommended. 
- Correctly show the internal sidebar on mobile (#105)
- Fixed "Show debug info" not working on mobile
- Several minor internal changes improving the reliability of the plugin

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
* Fix mobile version not working in 1.7.x (#102)
* Optimise "Replace all notes" by using the same mechanism that Obsidian uses to load workspaces

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description: * Update for changes in Obsidian 1.7.2 (#99)

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description: * Ensure the interstitial disappears when Homepage encounters an error (#97, #98)

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
* Ensure layout is done before running commands (#93)
* Revamp command UI on mobile, and minor polishes to the settings UI in general
* Remove the developer console message on startup

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
This contains minor UI polish that didn't make it into the initial 4.0.1 release.

* Tweak the new command button highlights
* Add a slight interstitial for initially opening the homepage on startup

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
Release 4.0.1 introduces significant compatibility changes, as well as a number of enhancements.

* Commands can now be set to only take effect on startup, or only when opened manually. This is along the same lines as "Open mode" and "Manual open mode".
* When a tab is on the left or right sidebar, maintain it when opening, even if "Replace all notes" is selected. In other words, opening a homepage should now only affect the main pane. (#89)
* As part of the above, improve the performance of "Replace all notes", especially when large volumes of notes are open.
* Auto-create is now disabled by default for new users, as it can cause issues when used with third-party syncing tools.
* Several changes to the settings UI:
     * Commands can now be reordered by dragging.
     * Commands that belong to a disabled plugin are now shown; they were previously hidden until the plugin was re-enabled. They have an icon and tooltip to distinguish them.
     * Homepage types that rely on a disabled plugin are now shown as greyed out in the dropdown; they were previously hidden.
     * Auto-create now shows a warning about issues with third-party syncing tools.
     * Separate mobile homepage now shows a warning that clarifies its behaviour when active.
* "Copy debug info" can now be accessed as a command as well as from Homepage's settings.

#### Removals and deprecations
Homepage 4.0.1 removes the ability to use Moment formatting to determine the homepage note, which was first depreciated in version 3.2. It is recommended to use the native Daily or Periodic Notes integration instead.

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description: * Fix issues with opening Obsidian after multiple windows were left open in the last session. This could either cause windows to incorrectly stay open or under certain circumstances cause the program to hang (#87)
releases.name: Release 3.8.1

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
* Add a command to set the active file as the homepage (#77)
* Fix the release notes leaf that is shown when upgrading Obsidian occasionally causing errors (#71)
* Fix commands not working in conjunction with workspaces (#80, #83)
* Fix deep links not working as expected on mobile platforms (#81)
* Fix "Replace all open notes" not replacing some kinds of files (#82)

#### Removals and deprecations
* Removed some upgrade logic for very old versions of the plugin
* When the option to use Moment syntax is selected, a warning is shown on startup that it is deprecated.
releases.name: Release 3.8

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
- If the homepage's content changes while opening, restore the old version. This should prevent a rare bug in the Obsidian API that causes the content to be wiped (#69).
- When checking if a note is the homepage note, check its name caselessly. This prevents issues from arising if the note's name and the value entered in the settings are cased differently (#73). 

#### Removals and deprecations

- Users which previously used the (now removed) "Use ribbon icon" setting will no longer have that automatically transferred to the native Obsidian setting.
releases.name: Release 3.7.0

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
* Add an option to never show the Obsidian release notes.
* Various internal changes to improve the maintainability and efficency of the plugin.

#### Removals and deprecations
* Homepage now requires Obsidian 1.4.10 or newer. Older versions of Obsidian should automatically fetch the preceding versions of this plugin.
* The option to use Moment syntax cannot be chosen anymore if it isn't already selected. This is because it is **deprecated and will be eventually removed in a future release**. To temporarily override this, open the developer console, enter `homepageLegacyOptionsEnabled = true;` and re-open the Homepage settings.
releases.name: Release 3.6.0

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
* Fix some edge cases where "Replace All" would leave some notes open. This should also improve issues with pinned notes as well.
* Improve testing infrastructure
releases.name: Release 3.5.2

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description: - Don't open the homepage when opening Obsidian using a URI that specifies a note or workspace (#65).
releases.name: Release 3.5.1

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
- Add an option to do nothing when opening the homepage. This is designed for use in conjunction with commands (#63).
- Fix a regression in 3.3.3 that could cause homepages opened over pinned notes to be empty (#60 and #62).
- Fix "Open when empty" freezing the vault when "Replace all notes" is selected as the manual opening mode (#64).
releases.name: Release 3.5

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
- Fix view reversion not working on rare occasions if the default view in Obsidian hasn't been changed.

#### Removals and deprecations
- The "Use ribbon icon" setting has been removed, since Obsidian has handled hiding the icon natively for several versions now. Users with hidden icons will have that setting transferred to the native Obsidian setting if it is available.
releases.name: Release 3.4

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description: * Rework how Homepage opens files. This fixes longstanding compatibility problems with other plugins, and should improve plugin performance and reliability.
releases.name: Release 3.3.3

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
* Resolve issues where the plugin prevented vaults from loading if Obsidian resolves the filename as an extensionless file. (part of #50)
* Correct handling of files with an extension other than `.md` or `.canvas` when auto-create is disabled.
releases.name: Release 3.3.2

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description: * Fix issues with opening notes with special plugin interfaces (such as Kanban or DB Note) when "Revert view" is enabled (#56)
releases.name: Release 3.3.1

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
* Add graph view support (#54)
* Fix issues with view reversion affecting other notes (#55 and #56)
releases.name: Release 3.3

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description: * Fix issues with Periodic Notes 1.0 support. (#53)
releases.name: Release 3.2.1

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
- Improve Daily Notes integration. Now the plugin should handle templates and certain advanced date formats correctly, thanks to @liamcain's [obsidian-daily-notes-interface](https://github.com/liamcain/obsidian-daily-notes-interface) library.
- This also allows complete Periodic Notes integration. It should work with the currently released 0.0.17 version, but also includes experimental compatibility with the 1.0 beta version as well. (partially #51)
- Add setting to automatically open homepage when all other notes are closed. (#52)
- Add setting to use homepage settings when opening it normally, like from a link or the files sidebar.
- Further improve view restoration reliability.
- Improve UI for when an option is selected that requires a specific plugin, and then that plugin is disabled.
- Remove mentions of "panes" in the settings as that terminology isn't used officially anymore.

#### Removals and deprecations
- The option to directly use Moment syntax **is now deprecated and will be eventually removed in a future release.** It is recommended to use Daily or Periodic Notes integration instead. If you have a use case that doesn't work with this, let me know.
- Auto-creation when using Daily Notes cannot be disabled anymore, as it is now managed by that plugin.
releases.name: Release 3.2

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
* Add a suite of unit tests that can be run via a special augmented version of the plugin. This should make the plugin significantly more reliable with regards to future changes.

* Use the "Keep open notes" homepage behaviour when middle-clicking the house as well.
* Improve view restoration to be more reliable.
* Never open a new tab if the active tab is currently empty (#49). To be clear, this only affects the currently focused tab.
releases.name: Release 3.1

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description: * Fix issues using workspaces (#47)
releases.name: Release 3.0.2

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
* Activate the alternate behaviour of the house icon when pressing a modifier key as well.
* Fix an issue where users upgrading from pre-3.x versions could not see all the settings.
* Make the "Copy debug info" button more visible.
releases.name: Release 3.0.1

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
Release 3.0 comprises a substantial improvement to plugin functionality, and includes significant changes to its internal design and workings.

* Add native Daily Notes integration, allowing you to use your Daily Note as a homepage. The old Moment formatting option is still available for those who use more advanced solutions such as Periodic Notes.
* Enable executing commands when opening the homepage. This allows advanced workflows that were previously impossible.
* Add the ability to store a separate homepage when using mobile devices. (#15) 
* Add an option to use a random note as the homepage.
* When right-clicking the house icon, the homepage now always uses the "Keep open notes" setting. (#45)
* Revamp the homepage selection UI.
* Add a button for copying debug info in the plugin settings. This should make bug reporting easier.
<!---->
* Remove limits on workspaces for mobile.
* Remove remaining traces of the deprecated `activeLeaf` Obsidian API.
* Various improvements to plugin internals and its build process.
<!---->
* Fix issues with the tab bar disappearing when using pinned notes. (partially #44)
releases.name: Release 3.0

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
* Redesign settings page
* Store workspace homepage separately from note homepage. This allows users who use workspaces to use the plugin on mobile (where workspaces are always disabled) and desktop with the same settings
* Allow opening the homepage in any view, including the new editing view with Live Preview

Note that several settings have changed as a result of this, hence the major version increase. The plugin should automatically migrate old users and preserve settings otherwise - let me know if you have any issues with this.

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description: * Support always opening the homepage in preview mode (#5)
releases.name: Release 1.1

releases.author: mirnovov
releases.description:
Release 1.0 comprises a major improvement to plugin functionality.

- Instead of the homepage being opened in place of the last active note, there are three options. Generally, this means behaviour is much more predictable and polished.
  - **Replace all open notes**
  - **Replace last note** (the old behaviour)
  - **Keep open notes**
- As part of the above, if the homepage is already open, then a duplicate copy won't be opened. 
- Both homepage and workspace entry now has an auto-suggest popup, based on the work of @liamcain and reused under the terms of the MIT license.
releases.name: Release 1.0
